test: RWKV pure non-transformer LOAO boundary test
description: Test if CTI universal law extends to RWKV-4, a pure linear RNN with NO attention mechanism. This is the strongest architecture boundary test.
architecture: RWKV-4: pure linear RNN (time-mixing + channel-mixing), 169M params, 12 layers, d=768
note: No attention, no convolution, no SSM - just linear recurrence with learned decay

hypothesis_A.label: PASS - Universal across ALL architectures including pure RNN
hypothesis_A.implication: CTI law is truly architecture-agnostic: holds for transformer, hybrid, AND pure RNN

hypothesis_B.label: FAIL - Attention required for universal law
hypothesis_B.implication: Universal constant alpha requires attention mechanism; RWKV represents a different regime
